title: Why Upstart Stock Is Trading Flat Following Revenue Beat, EPS Miss
text: Upstart Holdings stock showed mixed earnings results in Q1 2026, with revenue beating expectations but earnings per share missing. Revenue of $308.2 million topped the $303.1 million Street view for a 1.7% beat. However, adjusted EPS of $0.31 missed analyst expectations of $0.43 by 27%. Operating losses widened to $7.5 million from $4.5 million a year ago. The report highlighted 425,356 loans originated, up 77% year-over-year, with roughly $3.4 billion in total originations, up 61%. Total revenue was up 44% year-over-year and fee revenue rose 49% year-over-year. The market reaction to the revenue beat was muted due to the sharp earnings miss and wider-than-expected net loss, overshadowing the company's better-than-forecast first-quarter 2026 revenue.
